1.description: Retrieves and renders facts about an ITSM/ITOM work record itself (INC, REQ, PBM, CHG, AST, CI). Returns the record's own attributes: summary, status, priority, severity, owner, assignee, SLA, work notes, comments, linked-record ids (related problem, related changes, affected CI), and current known state. Use this agent when the user wants to UNDERSTAND THE ENTITY — its facts, its history, what it is, what is going on with it. Capability is bounded to the record's own stored fields; this agent does NOT retrieve external knowledge content (articles, runbooks, troubleshooting guides).

skills.name: Summarize a ticket
skills.description: Retrieves and renders facts about an ITSM/ITOM work record itself (INC, REQ, PBM, CHG, AST, CI). Returns the record's own attributes: summary, status, priority, severity, owner, assignee, SLA, work notes, comments, linked-record ids (related problem, related changes, affected CI), and current known state. Use this agent when the user wants to UNDERSTAND THE ENTITY — its facts, its history, what it is, what is going on with it. Capability is bounded to the record's own stored fields; this agent does NOT retrieve external knowledge content (articles, runbooks, troubleshooting guides).
use_when: the user gives a record id (INC/REQ/PRB/CHG/AST/CI) and asks what it is, what happened, or its current state
the user asks for a summary, explanation, walkthrough, or timeline of a specific record
a field-level follow-up on the active record (priority, status, owner, assignee, severity, SLA, requester, affected CI, linked problem or change, comments, work notes)
a bare canonical record id with no other intent
a contextual follow-up about the active focus record (e.g. 'this ticket', 'its priority', 'who owns it', 'any update')
not_when: the user wants external knowledge, documentation, how-to, troubleshooting, runbooks, or KB articles (route to uc03_kb_lookup)
the user wants other tickets similar to this one, duplicates, or related incidents (route to uc02_similar_tickets)
the user wants to create, update, assign, approve, close, reopen, or escalate a record (route to an action/fulfilment agent)
the user wants to search, filter, count, compare, or report across multiple records
the user wants root-cause analysis or remediation guidance beyond the record's stored fields
the user asks a general IT question with no specific record or active focus record
the user wants to find past incidents or requests that are similar to the focused ticket (route to uc02_similar_tickets)
the user seeks external knowledge or guidance on resolving the issue related to the record (route to uc03_kb_lookup)
examples: what's going on with this ticket?
what is the priority of this incident?
show the timeline for this problem

input_fields.name: service_id
input_fields.description: Service module: incident | request | problem | change | asset | cmdb_ci. Auto-derived from the ticket_id prefix when not supplied.
